name: personal-erp-workspace
description: Buildable personal cash-flow ERP starter using Next.js, NestJS, Prisma, and MySQL

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @personal-erp/web" "npm run dev --workspace @personal-erp/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @personal-erp/api && npm run build --workspace @personal-erp/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run start --workspace @personal-erp/web" "npm run start --workspace @personal-erp/api"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:root && npm run lint:contracts && npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:contracts && npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:api
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:api
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json tsconfig.base.json apps/api/package.json apps/api/tsconfig*.json apps/web/package.json apps/web/tsconfig*.json apps/web/playwright.config.mjs apps/web/e2e/**/*.ts packages/contracts/package.json packages/contracts/tsconfig.json packages/contracts/src/**/*.ts apps/api/test/**/*.ts apps/web/test/**/*.ts README.md CONTRIBUTING.md ENVIRONMENT_SETUP.md PORTFOLIO_ARCHITECTURE_GUIDE.md docs/**/*.md .prettierrc.json eslint.config.mjs scripts/*.cjs .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json tsconfig.base.json apps/api/package.json apps/api/tsconfig*.json apps/web/package.json apps/web/tsconfig*.json apps/web/playwright.config.mjs apps/web/e2e/**/*.ts packages/contracts/package.json packages/contracts/tsconfig.json packages/contracts/src/**/*.ts apps/api/test/**/*.ts apps/web/test/**/*.ts README.md CONTRIBUTING.md ENVIRONMENT_SETUP.md PORTFOLIO_ARCHITECTURE_GUIDE.md docs/**/*.md .prettierrc.json eslint.config.mjs scripts/*.cjs .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.check:quick: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run check:quick && npm run build && npm run test
